M6C M6C_LESIONS_FOOT (M6C) Open Lesions on Foot CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - open lesions on foot. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
435 M6D M6D_TRIMMED (M6D) Nails/Calluses Trimmed on Foot CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days - nails/calluses trimmed in last 90 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
436 M6E M6E_PRVENT_FT_CARE (M6E) Received Preventative/Protective Foot Care CHAR 1 Skin condition: foot problems and care in last 7 days -
